name: Amazon
collaborationStyle: affiliate, product placement, seasonal campaigns
notes: Primarily affiliate/Associates for smaller creators; direct deals reserved for macro+

name: Apple
collaborationStyle: product launch, lifestyle integration, campaign-based
notes: Extremely selective; goes through agency only; rarely approaches creators directly

name: IKEA
collaborationStyle: home tour, room makeover, product integration
notes: Strong fit for home, organization, and aesthetic lifestyle creators

name: Dyson
collaborationStyle: product review, home integration, unboxing
notes: High CPM but selective; best fit for home, beauty, and clean-aesthetic creators

name: Notion
collaborationStyle: workflow demo, tutorial, productivity integration
notes: One of the most creator-friendly sponsors; responsive team, fast onboarding

name: Casper
collaborationStyle: sleep routine, bedroom tour, wellness integration
notes: Great fit for morning/night routine creators and wellness-adjacent lifestyle content

name: Hims & Hers
collaborationStyle: personal wellness story, sponsored segment, lifestyle integration
notes: Actively sponsors lifestyle and wellness creators; good rates for mid-tier

name: Squarespace
collaborationStyle: website showcase, brand story, mid-roll segment
notes: Perennial YouTube sponsor; nearly universal fit for any creator with a personal brand

name: Ritual Vitamins
collaborationStyle: daily routine integration, wellness story, subscription unboxing
notes: Female-skewing supplement brand; ideal for morning routine and wellness lifestyle creators

name: BetterHelp
collaborationStyle: personal story, mental wellness segment, mid-roll
notes: High CPM but requires authentic personal angle; controversial with some audiences — creator should be comfortable with the brand

name: Skylight Calendar
collaborationStyle: family routine, home organization, product demo
notes: Smart home family calendar; strong fit for family or home organization creators

name: Lomi
collaborationStyle: sustainability story, kitchen integration, unboxing
notes: Home composting device; ideal for sustainability-minded or eco-lifestyle creators

name: Oura Ring
collaborationStyle: sleep tracking story, health data integration, wearable review
notes: Rising health wearable with strong lifestyle crossover; high engagement from health-conscious audiences

name: Couture Club
collaborationStyle: outfit integration, haul, lifestyle aesthetic content
notes: UK-based fashion brand actively building creator partnerships; good for aesthetic lifestyle creators

name: Pela Case
collaborationStyle: sustainability mention, product integration, unboxing
notes: Compostable phone case brand; easy integration for any creator with an eco or minimalist angle

name: Fable
collaborationStyle: home aesthetic, dinner/cooking content, tableware showcase
notes: Premium sustainable tableware brand; perfect for creators in the cottagecore, slow living, or aesthetic home space

name: Nike
collaborationStyle: lifestyle campaign, apparel integration, ambassador
notes: Crossover from fitness — equally relevant for lifestyle creators with active or streetwear aesthetic

name: Spotify
collaborationStyle: playlist integration, podcast story, daily routine mention
notes: Natural fit for any lifestyle creator — morning routines, workouts, commutes, study sessions

name: Patagonia
collaborationStyle: outdoor lifestyle integration, values-driven story, apparel showcase
notes: Extremely selective; prioritizes creators with genuine sustainability or outdoor lifestyle alignment

name: Rolex
collaborationStyle: luxury lifestyle integration, watch showcase, aspirational content
notes: Rarely sponsors directly; when they do it's macro+ only; highest CPM in lifestyle category

name: Calm
collaborationStyle: mental wellness story, sleep routine integration, stress segment
notes: One of the most active wellness sponsors on YouTube; easy integration for any routine-based lifestyle creator

name: Headspace
collaborationStyle: meditation integration, mindfulness story, daily habit segment
notes: Strong alternative to Calm; slightly more playful tone; good fit for productivity and wellness lifestyle creators

name: Eight Sleep
collaborationStyle: sleep optimization story, biohacking integration, bedroom tech review
notes: Smart mattress cover brand; high CPM and strong fit for biohacking, productivity, and optimization creators

name: Theragun (Therabody)
collaborationStyle: recovery routine, wellness integration, product demo
notes: Crossover between fitness and lifestyle; easy integration for any creator with a wellness or self-care angle

name: Allbirds
collaborationStyle: everyday wear integration, sustainability story, outfit showcase
notes: Eco-friendly footwear brand; strong fit for minimalist, sustainable, or everyday lifestyle creators

name: MasterClass
collaborationStyle: self-improvement story, course highlight, gifting segment
notes: Premium online learning platform; very active YouTube sponsor; strong fit for self-improvement and lifestyle creators

name: Papier
collaborationStyle: journaling routine, stationery unboxing, planning content
notes: Premium personalized stationery brand; great fit for journaling, planning, and slow-living lifestyle creators

name: Haus
collaborationStyle: hosting content, aperitivo ritual, lifestyle drink integration
notes: Low-ABV aperitif brand; ideal for creators in the aesthetic hosting, dinner party, or slow-living space

name: Grammarly
collaborationStyle: productivity integration, writing workflow, mid-roll segment
notes: Technically mid-tier in fame but listed here as emerging in lifestyle context; one of YouTube's most prolific sponsors overall

name: Recess
collaborationStyle: calm lifestyle integration, drink showcase, stress-relief story
notes: CBD and adaptogen sparkling water brand; strong fit for creators in the calm, wellness, or aesthetic lifestyle space

name: Italic
collaborationStyle: luxury-for-less haul, membership walkthrough, quality goods showcase
notes: Members-only luxury goods brand without markups; ideal for minimalist or quality-over-quantity lifestyle creators

name: Superhuman
collaborationStyle: productivity story, email workflow showcase, high-performer integration
notes: Fastest email client on the market; highest CPM among emerging lifestyle brands due to affluent professional audience
